name: Grilled Honey Mustard Chicken Breasts
recipeIngredient: 6 whole chicken breasts without skin, halved
recipeInstructions:
1. Place garlic, mustard, honey, lemon juice, and freshly ground pepper in a work bowl fitted with a steel blade food processor.
2. Process to mix until all ingredients are thoroughly blended.
3. Gradually add oil in a thin stream into the bowl or through the feed tube, then process to mix until the mixture is thoroughly blended.
4. Taste and adjust seasoning if necessary.
5. Pour all of the marinade over the chicken breasts and spread to coat evenly. Let marinate for at least several hours or up to 24 hours ahead. Cover loosely with plastic wrap and turn several times while marinating.
6. Bring the chicken to room temperature before cooking.
7. Cook over grill approximately 6 minutes on each side.
